html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.MCV dose 0 decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Client is not due for MCV0 Case 1
Client is not due for MCV0 Case 2
Client is not due for MCV0 Case 3
Client is not due for MCV0 Case 4
Client is not due for MCV0
Client is not due for MCV0 Guidance

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.MCV dose 0 decision table in the Immunization CPG
